title: papaver dubium subsp. laevigatum
intro: Papaver dubium subsp. laevigatum, also known as smooth poppy or meadow poppy, is a subspecies of the Papaver dubium plant, a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health issues, including pain, inflammation, and sleep disorders. The health benefits of Papaver dubium subsp. laevigatum include its analgesic and sedative effects, making it a potential natural remedy for insomnia and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
